title: Exhuma
synopsis: The process of excavating an ominous grave unleashes long hidden secrets and dreadful consequences buried underneath.

title: Incantation
synopsis: Six years ago, Li Ronan was cursed after breaking a religious taboo. Now, she must protect her daughter from the consequences of her actions.

title: Gonjiam: Haunted Asylum
synopsis: The crew of a horror web series travels to an abandoned asylum for a live broadcast. They encounter much more than expected.

title: Hereditary
synopsis: A grieving family is haunted by tragic and disturbing occurrences, and begins to unravel dark secrets.

title: The Wailing
synopsis: A stranger arrives in a little village and soon after a mysterious sickness starts spreading. A policeman is drawn into the incident and is forced to solve the mystery.
